mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS RESULT FROM MEMBER WHERE NICKNAME = #{nickname}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM MEMBER WHERE STATUS = 'DELETED'
AND TO_DATE(LATEST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') < SYSDATE - 30
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE email = #{email} AND ROWNUM = 1
